title: aria torminalis f. mollis
intro: Aria torminalis f. mollis, also known as Buckthorn or Hart's Tongue Buckthorn, is a flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly found in Europe and North Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral compounds. The health benefits associated with Aria torminalis f. mollis include relief from digestive issues, such as constipation and diarrhea, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of certain respiratory infections. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used externally to treat wounds and skin conditions.
